textPlain: In a similar vein, I recommend Looking for Trouble[0], a memoir by Virginia Cowles. I haven't finished it, but it's a look back at her time as a foreign correspondent during the Spanish Civil War and World War II.I found it courtesy a comment from cooldrcool1 on a very short discussion here on HN[1, 2].[0] https://www.penguinrandomhouse.com/books/714362/looking-for-...[1] https://news.ycombinator.com/item?id=32411900[2] https://lithub.com/christina-lamb-on-the-remarkable-life-and...
This is just too much to read in 2025.
Check out the short version on TikTok.
